prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Renault-sourced F4R 2.0L turbo (engine code: F4Rt 874) with a fully built version featuring forged Mahle pistons (8.8:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a balanced crankshaft from JE Motorsport. Pair with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Scorpion, featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter and a titanium Akrapovič rear silencer.

Suspension: Install Öhlins TTX40 coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the Europa S’s aluminum-intensive chassis. Replace the stock anti-roll bars with Eibach adjustable front (24mm) and rear (22mm) units, paired with spherical bearing end links from SuperPro. Add a polycarbonate front strut brace by Ultra Racing for chassis rigidity.

Drivetrain: Upgrade the stock 6-speed manual transmission (TL4) with a Quaife ATB helical LSD and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) with a lightweight flywheel. Replace the stock driveshafts with carbon fiber units from GKN Driveline, and fit a limited-slip differential cooler by PWR to handle increased torque.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Install a full carbon fiber aero kit by Vorsteiner, including a front splitter with integrated canards, side skirts with air curtains, and a rear diffuser with a central exhaust outlet. Add a carbon fiber rear wing by APR Performance (GT-250 model) with adjustable angle of attack (0-12 degrees).

Wheels & Tires: Fit OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (18x8.5 ET35 front, 19x10 ET45 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40 R18 front, 275/35 R19 rear). Use titanium wheel bolts by H&R and center-lock adapters from BBS for track-day convenience.

Exterior & Interior: Replace the stock headlights with LED units from LUX Automotive, featuring adaptive bi-xenon projectors and sequential turn signals. Add a carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling. Inside, install a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.
